---
title: "James Anthony Froude"
---

## James Anthony Froude

**Dates:** (1818-1894)

### Description

historian,  son of the Ven. Richard Hurrell Froude

### Biography

[ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from March 14. 1849
- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
